overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from a third-person perspective following an eagle soaring over a rugged wilderness landscape. The bird flies over red rock canyons, dense coniferous forests, and geothermal hot springs under an overcast sky, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon with red rock formations and winding river

agents.ego_description: soaring over the canyon following the path of the winding river below

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock formations lining the canyon sides
blue water river snaking through the canyon floor
dense pine trees covering the canyon slopes

segments.scene_description: The eagle glides over a dramatic canyon landscape with towering red rock cliffs on the left and a winding river below. The dense coniferous forest covers the right slopes under an overcast sky, creating a moody wilderness atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain slopes with snow-capped peaks visible

events.description: snow-capped mountains become visible in the background as altitude increases

agents.ego_description: gaining altitude over rocky terrain while snow-capped mountains come into view ahead

entered.detail: distant mountain range with white snow peaks visible against the clouds
exposed rock faces and boulders replacing the forest floor

segments.scene_description: As the eagle gains altitude, the canyon falls away to reveal rocky mountain terrain below and majestic snow-capped peaks in the distant background. The landscape transitions from the enclosed canyon to open mountain slopes.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest valley with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: gliding smoothly over the forest canopy toward a distant geothermal area

entered.detail: expansive valley completely covered in dense coniferous forest

segments.scene_description: The eagle soars over a vast forest valley with the tree canopy passing beneath. Snow-capped mountains remain visible in the background as the bird approaches a distant area with geothermal features.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal basin with vibrant turquoise hot springs

events.description: landscape transitions to geothermal area with colorful hot springs and steam vents

agents.ego_description: circling lower over the geothermal pools to observe the vibrant blue water and steam vents

entered.detail: circular hot springs with bright turquoise water and colorful mineral deposits
rising steam columns indicating geothermal activity around the pools
orange and yellow mineral crust surrounding the blue water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a geothermal basin with striking turquoise hot springs surrounded by colorful mineral deposits. Steam rises from the vents as the eagle circles overhead, providing a clear view of the vibrant geothermal features against the gray rocky ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon with distant stone bridge

events.description: bird banks sharply and turns away from geothermal area toward rocky canyon

agents.ego_description: banking away from the hot springs and flying toward a rocky canyon with a distant bridge structure

entered.detail: deep rocky gorge with steep cliff walls
distant bridge structure spanning the canyon in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The eagle banks away from the geothermal basin and flies toward a rugged rocky canyon. A distant stone bridge becomes visible spanning the gorge ahead, while the forested cliffs and mountain ridges frame the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins within a moody, enclosed canyon and gradually expands into a vast, open mountain wilderness. It begins by gliding past towering red rock cliffs and a winding river, with dense coniferous forests clinging to the slopes under an overcast sky. As the eagle gains altitude, the narrow canyon walls fall away to reveal rugged mountain terrain and majestic snow-capped peaks emerging in the distant background. The scene then shifts to a wide soar over a vast forest valley, with the tree canopy passing rapidly beneath before the camera turns toward a distant area of geothermal features.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vibrant geothermal basin into a rugged, expansive canyon landscape. It begins by circling above striking turquoise hot springs, where steam rises from vents and colorful mineral deposits contrast against the gray rocky ground. As the eagle banks away from the geothermal features, the view shifts toward a deep gorge framed by forested cliffs and distant mountain ridges. The scene then opens further to reveal a stone bridge spanning the rocky canyon ahead, completing the movement from the concentrated heat of the basin to the vast scale of the wilderness.
